html:
Anna's Ginger Pudding

Ingredients

2 x 200 g packets ginger biscuits (Ginger Nuts)

80 ml glazed ginger pieces, chopped into small cubes (or to taste)

750 ml cream

125 ml Demerara sugar mixed with 15 ml ground dried ginger (or to taste)

 

Method

  • Break the ginger biscuits into rough pieces (about 2 cm) and mix lightly with the glazed ginger.

 

  • Arrange the mixture in a well-greased ovenproof glass dish.

 

  • Pour the cream over the biscuit pieces and sprinkle the sugar-ginger mixture on top.

 

  • Bake at 180ºC for 30 – 40 minutes or until the cream stops bubbling and the sugar layer is crisp.

 

  • Serve with rich-and-delicious vanilla ice cream.

 

Makes about 8 civilised portions 😊
